mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, level, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM kg_category ORDER BY level ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, name, level, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM kg_category WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kg_category(parent_id, name, level, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{level}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE kg_category SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, level = #{level}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kg_category WHERE parent_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM resources WHERE category_id = #{id}
